# cairn-docgen

Generated from the maintainer `cairn-docgen` clap command tree.

## Help

```text
Generate Cairn docs reference Markdown

Usage: cairn-docgen [OPTIONS]

Options:
      --check
          Run in check mode: compare emitted docs against on-disk files

      --write
          Write generated docs; default when neither --check nor --write is set

      --out <PATH>
          Workspace root (defaults to the parent of CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR)

  -h, --help
          Print help
```
